name: css-basic
title: CSS Basic "Link Tree"
description: This template builds on the HTML Basic template and introduces some of the core CSS concepts. This template is a solid starting point for a simple "Link Tree" style page when first getting oriented with CSS.

vars.author: netnet
vars.p: Welcome to my page! Take a look at my recent projects and interests below.
